fields.title: sandbox/task: centralize parent effective sandbox snapshot
fields.description:
Problem:
- `extensions/tau/src/task/index.ts` currently re-computes effective sandbox config as a fallback.

Goal:
- Export a small helper from sandbox (or shared) so task doesn't know sandbox internals.

Suggested shape:
- `getEffectiveSandboxConfig(ctx, state)` or similar.

DoD:
- `extensions/tau/src/task/index.ts` no longer calls `computeEffectiveConfig`/`discoverWorkspaceRoot` directly.
- Behavior unchanged.
- `npm -C extensions/tau test` passes.
fields.close_reason: Done: created getEffectiveSandboxConfig in sandbox/index.ts and used it in task/index.ts. Removed computeEffectiveConfig and discoverWorkspaceRoot calls from task/index.ts.
